title: Introduction to Health Economics and Finance
focus: Foundations of health economics, health financing, demand for healthcare, insurance and introductory economic evaluation.

title: Health Economics and Finance
role: Lecturer and Course Coordinator / Primary Course Coordinator
focus: Healthcare markets, provider and patient behaviour, public and private finance, economic evaluation and health-policy decisions.

title: Behavioural Economics
role: Lecturer and Course Coordinator / Primary Course Coordinator
focus: Rational-choice benchmarks, behavioural mechanisms, decision-making under risk and uncertainty, experiments and behavioural public policy.
